title: contact_query: negative position panics on slice indexing
description: Trigger: ChatContact/query with {position: -1, limit: 3} when contacts exist. In: let start = (position as usize).min(ids.len()); let end = ((position + limit) as usize).min(ids.len()); — a negative position casts to usize::MAX, clamped to ids.len(). A small positive limit casts to its value. ids[start..end] where start=ids.len() > end=small panics in Rust. Same bug exists in contact_query_changes. Fix: reject position < 0 with invalidArguments before the cast.
close_reason: Fixed in daemon/src/store.rs and daemon/src/jmap.rs; 7 new regression tests added
